title: align_sign_prototype data payload
description: v0.78.0 — ProtoSnap per-sign prototype ALIGNMENT (NOT detection). Snaps a KNOWN sign's prototype skeleton onto a PRE-CROPPED, ALREADY-IDENTIFIED single-sign image (both crop and identity supplied by the caller) and returns a match score + aligned-skeleton path. Does NOT detect/segment/label signs on a tablet photo. Torch-sidecar-gated: when the python3.11 ProtoSnap venv is absent, inference_available is false and the degraded result carries an actionable setup message in warnings. inference_available is REQUIRED so the degraded path is a first-class, schema-valid result, not an error. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

sign_name.description: The KNOWN sign identity / prompt the caller supplied. An input, not an output — this is alignment, not recognition.

sign_crop_path.description: Absolute path to the pre-cropped single-sign image that was aligned.

inference_available.description: False when the ProtoSnap torch sidecar is not installed (the default CI/uninstalled state). When false, see warnings for the setup command; agg_score/aligned_skeleton_path stay null.

device.description: Torch device the sidecar ran on (mps/cpu), or null when inference was not run.

agg_score.description: ProtoSnap aggregate alignment / match score, or null when inference was not run.

aligned_skeleton_path.description: Path to the aligned prototype skeleton image written under getCacheDir()/protosnap/<sign>/, or null.

init_png_path.description: Path to the initial (pre-alignment) overlay PNG, or null.

iterations.description: Number of alignment-optimization iterations performed, or null.

note.description: Constant scope disclaimer: 'alignment-not-detection; requires installed torch sidecar'.
